title: heterochiton fontanesii subsp. bollei
intro: Heterochiton fontanesii subsp. bollei is a plant species that belongs to the family Phyllariaceae, commonly known as the "New Zealand fern tree" or "tree fern". It is valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The plant's extracts have been shown to have health benefits such as reducing inflammation, improving wound healing, and exhibiting antioxidant activity. Heterochiton fontanesii subsp. bollei is prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and ointments, which are used to harness its medicinal properties.
